(illumina) [jlopez@flare sky]$ ls illumina/illum/ -lsrh
total 156K
8.0K -rwxrwxr-x 1  7.7K Aug 22  2025 warp.py
4.0K -rw-rw-r-- 1  2.1K Aug 22  2025 street_orientation.py
8.0K -rw-rw-r-- 1  5.7K Aug 22  2025 SpectralPowerDistribution.py
 16K -rw-rw-r-- 1   14K Aug 22  2025 pytools.py
8.0K drwxrwxr-x 2  4.0K Aug 22  2025 __pycache__
4.0K -rwxrwxr-x 1  3.9K Aug 22  2025 OPAC.py
 12K -rw-rw-r-- 1   11K Aug 22  2025 MultiScaleData.py
4.0K -rw-rw-r-- 1  2.0K Aug 22  2025 main.py
8.0K -rw-rw-r-- 1  6.6K Aug 22  2025 inventory.py
4.0K -rwxrwxr-x 1  1.8K Aug 22  2025 integrate.py
 12K -rwxrwxr-x 1  9.0K Aug 22  2025 inputs.py
4.0K -rwxrwxr-x 1   624 Aug 22  2025 init.py
4.0K -rw-rw-r-- 1    22 Aug 22  2025 __init__.py
4.0K -rwxrwxr-x 1  1.8K Aug 22  2025 failed.py
8.0K -rwxrwxr-x 1  6.6K Aug 22  2025 extract.py
8.0K -rwxrwxr-x 1  4.2K Aug 22  2025 domain.py
4.0K -rwxrwxr-x 1  2.9K Aug 22  2025 convert.py
 16K -rwxrwxr-x 1   13K Aug 22  2025 batches.py
8.0K -rw-rw-r-- 1  7.1K Aug 22  2025 AngularPowerDistribution.py
 12K -rwxrwxr-x 1  8.7K Aug 22  2025 alternate.py

item.title: Illumina Project
item.description:
Illumina documentation

paste doc from my personal HP laptop

Running a simulation

Generate plots

1source ~/miniconda/bin/activate
2(illum) python3 interp_plots.py

Add results to website

1git add .
2git commit -m "added new results"
3git push origin main
4npm run deploy		    <- very important

Site should be ready within the next minute here
